name: Mrs. Inman's Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter or oleo together with sugar.
3. Add well beaten eggs.
4. Mix in sifted flour, baking powder, nuts, vanilla, and chocolate (or 7 tablespoons cocoa if squares are not available).
5. Pour mixture into a greased 9x13-inch pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
7. Cut into squares.
